title: lagenophora stipitata var. normalis
intro: Lagenophora stipitata var. normalis, also known as New Zealand button daisy, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Lagenophora stipitata var. normalis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. Lagenophora stipitata var. normalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
